  "findings": [
    "Incorrect flashing tape sequence at the window sill",
    "Reverse-lapping of flashing materials creating a water-shedding failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the incorrectly sequenced sill flashing tape",
    "Re-apply flashing tape in the correct shingle-fashion sequence (sill, jambs, then head)",
    "Verify integration with the weather-resistive barrier (WRB) prior to window installation"
  ],
  "rationale": "The flashing tape at the sill was installed out of sequence, creating a reverse lap (shingle-lap violation) where water running down the WRB or window frame can penetrate behind the flashing rather than shedding over it. This violates standard water-shedding principles and manufacturer installation instructions.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R703",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions"
  ]
}
